# Roam China

Roam China is a practical travel guide for international visitors planning trips to China. It focuses on destinations, day-by-day itineraries, regional Chinese food, local transport, mobile payments, travel apps, and cultural tips.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://cntripaimap.online/): Overview of China travel planning resources.
- [China destinations](https://cntripaimap.online/destinations): City and region guides for Beijing, Shanghai, Xi'an, Chengdu, Guilin, Hangzhou, Hong Kong, and Zhangjiajie.
- [China itineraries](https://cntripaimap.online/itineraries): Curated travel routes including classic first-time trips, nature routes, Silk Road travel, and Guangzhou food travel.
- [Chinese cuisines](https://cntripaimap.online/cuisines): Regional cuisine guide covering major culinary traditions and signature dishes.
- [Travel guides](https://cntripaimap.online/guides): Practical articles for first-time visitors, mobile payments, apps, transport, and food.

## Useful Deep Links

- [Beijing travel guide](https://cntripaimap.online/destination/beijing): Imperial sights, Great Wall planning, and Peking duck.
- [Shanghai travel guide](https://cntripaimap.online/destination/shanghai): Bund, Lujiazui, gardens, and xiaolongbao.
- [Chengdu travel guide](https://cntripaimap.online/destination/chengdu): Panda base, teahouses, Sichuan food, and relaxed city travel.
- [Classic 14-day China itinerary](https://cntripaimap.online/itinerary/classic-14-days): Beijing, Xi'an, Chengdu, and Shanghai.
- [Chinese travel apps guide](https://cntripaimap.online/guide/g2): Alipay, WeChat, Didi, maps, translation, and connectivity.
- [Food travel guide to China](https://cntripaimap.online/guide/g3): Regional cuisines, ordering advice, and dining etiquette.

## Editorial Notes

- Audience: English-speaking international travelers visiting China.
- Tone: practical, direct, and planning-oriented.
- Content emphasis: answer common pre-trip questions clearly, avoid keyword stuffing, and keep itinerary advice actionable.
